DirectoryDescriptions.description:
The list of available DirectoryDescription objects that were retrieved.

It is possible that this list contains less than the number of items specified in the Limit member of the request. This occurs if there are less than the requested number of items left to retrieve, or if the limitations of the operation have been exceeded.

NextToken.description: If not null, more results are available. Pass this value for the NextToken parameter in a subsequent call to DescribeDirectories to retrieve the next set of items.

DirectoryId.description: The directory identifier.

Name.description: The fully qualified name of the directory.

Alias.description: The alias for the directory. If no alias exists, the alias is the directory identifier, such as d-XXXXXXXXXX.

AccessUrl.description: The access URL for the directory, such as http://<alias>.awsapps.com. If no alias exists, <alias> is the directory identifier, such as d-XXXXXXXXXX.

DnsIpAddrs.description: The IP addresses of the DNS servers for the directory. For a Simple AD or Microsoft AD directory, these are the IP addresses of the Simple AD or Microsoft AD directory servers. For an AD Connector directory, these are the IP addresses of self-managed directory to which the AD Connector is connected.

DnsIpv6Addrs.description: The IPv6 addresses of the DNS servers for the directory. For a Simple AD or Microsoft AD directory, these are the IPv6 addresses of the Simple AD or Microsoft AD directory servers. For an AD Connector directory, these are the IPv6 addresses of the DNS servers or domain controllers in your self-managed directory to which the AD Connector is connected.

ShareStatus.description: Current directory status of the shared Managed Microsoft AD directory.

ShareMethod.description: The method used when sharing a directory to determine whether the directory should be shared within your Amazon Web Services organization (ORGANIZATIONS) or with any Amazon Web Services account by sending a shared directory request (HANDSHAKE).

ShareNotes.description: A directory share request that is sent by the directory owner to the directory consumer. The request includes a typed message to help the directory consumer administrator determine whether to approve or reject the share invitation.

LaunchTime.description: The date and time when the directory was created.

StageLastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time when the stage was last updated.

VpcSettings.description: A DirectoryVpcSettingsDescription object that contains additional information about a directory. Present only for Simple AD and Managed Microsoft AD directories.

VpcId.description: The identifier of the VPC that the directory is in.

SubnetIds.description: The identifiers of the subnets for the directory servers.

SecurityGroupId.description: The domain controller security group identifier for the directory.

AvailabilityZones.description: The list of Availability Zones that the directory is in.

ConnectSettings.description: DirectoryConnectSettingsDescription object that contains additional information about an AD Connector directory. Present only for AD Connector directories.

VpcId.description: The identifier of the VPC that the AD Connector is in.

SubnetIds.description: A list of subnet identifiers in the VPC that the AD Connector is in.

CustomerUserName.description: The user name of the service account in your self-managed directory.

SecurityGroupId.description: The security group identifier for the AD Connector directory.

AvailabilityZones.description: The Availability Zones that the directory is in.

ConnectIps.description: The IP addresses of the AD Connector servers.

ConnectIpsV6.description: The IPv6 addresses of the AD Connector servers.

RadiusSettings.description: Information about the RadiusSettings object configured for this directory.

RadiusServers.description: The fully qualified domain name (FQDN) or IP addresses of the RADIUS server endpoints, or the FQDN or IP addresses of your RADIUS server load balancer.

RadiusServersIpv6.description: The IPv6 addresses of the RADIUS server endpoints or RADIUS server load balancer.

RadiusPort.description: The port that your RADIUS server is using for communications. Your self-managed network must allow inbound traffic over this port from the Directory Service servers.

RadiusTimeout.description: The amount of time, in seconds, to wait for the RADIUS server to respond.

RadiusRetries.description: The maximum number of times that communication with the RADIUS server is retried after the initial attempt.

SharedSecret.description: Required for enabling RADIUS on the directory.

AuthenticationProtocol.description: The protocol specified for your RADIUS endpoints.

RadiusStatus.description: The status of the RADIUS MFA server connection.

SsoEnabled.description: Indicates whether single sign-on is enabled for the directory. For more information, see EnableSso and DisableSso.

DesiredNumberOfDomainControllers.description: The desired number of domain controllers in the directory if the directory is Microsoft AD.

OwnerDirectoryDescription.description: Describes the Managed Microsoft AD directory in the directory owner account.

DirectoryId.description: Identifier of the Managed Microsoft AD directory in the directory owner account.

DnsIpAddrs.description: IP address of the directory’s domain controllers.

DnsIpv6Addrs.description: IPv6 addresses of the directory’s domain controllers.

VpcSettings.description: Information about the VPC settings for the directory.

VpcId.description: The identifier of the VPC that the directory is in.

SubnetIds.description: The identifiers of the subnets for the directory servers.

SecurityGroupId.description: The domain controller security group identifier for the directory.

AvailabilityZones.description: The list of Availability Zones that the directory is in.

RadiusServers.description: The fully qualified domain name (FQDN) or IP addresses of the RADIUS server endpoints, or the FQDN or IP addresses of your RADIUS server load balancer.

RadiusServersIpv6.description: The IPv6 addresses of the RADIUS server endpoints or RADIUS server load balancer.

RadiusPort.description: The port that your RADIUS server is using for communications. Your self-managed network must allow inbound traffic over this port from the Directory Service servers.

RadiusTimeout.description: The amount of time, in seconds, to wait for the RADIUS server to respond.

RadiusRetries.description: The maximum number of times that communication with the RADIUS server is retried after the initial attempt.

SharedSecret.description: Required for enabling RADIUS on the directory.

AuthenticationProtocol.description: The protocol specified for your RADIUS endpoints.

NetworkType.description: Network type of the directory in the directory owner account.

RegionsInfo.description: Lists the Regions where the directory has replicated.

PrimaryRegion.description: The Region where the Managed Microsoft AD directory was originally created.

AdditionalRegions.description: Lists the Regions where the directory has been replicated, excluding the primary Region.

OsVersion.description: The operating system (OS) version of the directory.

HybridSettings.description: Contains information about the hybrid directory configuration for the directory, including Amazon Web Services System Manager managed node identifiers and DNS IPs.

SelfManagedDnsIpAddrs.description: The IP addresses of the DNS servers in your self-managed AD environment.

SelfManagedInstanceIds.description: The identifiers of the self-managed instances with SSM used for hybrid directory operations.

EventTopics.description: A list of Amazon SNS topic names that receive status messages from the specified Directory ID.

DirectoryId.description: The Directory ID of an Directory Service directory that will publish status messages to an Amazon SNS topic.

TopicName.description: The name of an Amazon SNS topic the receives status messages from the directory.

TopicArn.description: The Amazon SNS topic ARN (Amazon Resource Name).

CreatedDateTime.description: The date and time of when you associated your directory with the Amazon SNS topic.

Snapshots.description:
The list of Snapshot objects that were retrieved.

It is possible that this list contains less than the number of items specified in the Limit member of the request. This occurs if there are less than the requested number of items left to retrieve, or if the limitations of the operation have been exceeded.

NextToken.description: If not null, more results are available. Pass this value in the NextToken member of a subsequent call to DescribeSnapshots.

DirectoryId.description: The directory identifier.

StartTime.description: The date and time that the snapshot was taken.

Trusts.description:
The list of Trust objects that were retrieved.

It is possible that this list contains less than the number of items specified in the Limit member of the request. This occurs if there are less than the requested number of items left to retrieve, or if the limitations of the operation have been exceeded.

NextToken.description: If not null, more results are available. Pass this value for the NextToken parameter in a subsequent call to DescribeTrusts to retrieve the next set of items.

DirectoryId.description: The Directory ID of the Amazon Web Services directory involved in the trust relationship.

TrustId.description: The unique ID of the trust relationship.

RemoteDomainName.description: The Fully Qualified Domain Name (FQDN) of the external domain involved in the trust relationship.

TrustType.description: The trust relationship type. Forest is the default.

CreatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the trust relationship was created.

LastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the trust relationship was last updated.

StateLastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the TrustState was last updated.

SelectiveAuth.description: Current state of selective authentication for the trust.

DirectoryLimits.description: A DirectoryLimits object that contains the directory limits for the current Region.

CloudOnlyDirectoriesLimit.description: The maximum number of cloud directories allowed in the Region.

CloudOnlyDirectoriesCurrentCount.description: The current number of cloud directories in the Region.

CloudOnlyDirectoriesLimitReached.description: Indicates if the cloud directory limit has been reached.

CloudOnlyMicrosoftADLimit.description: The maximum number of Managed Microsoft AD directories allowed in the region.

CloudOnlyMicrosoftADCurrentCount.description: The current number of Managed Microsoft AD directories in the region.

CloudOnlyMicrosoftADLimitReached.description: Indicates if the Managed Microsoft AD directory limit has been reached.

ConnectedDirectoriesLimit.description: The maximum number of connected directories allowed in the Region.

ConnectedDirectoriesCurrentCount.description: The current number of connected directories in the Region.

ConnectedDirectoriesLimitReached.description: Indicates if the connected directory limit has been reached.

Assessments.description: A list of assessment summaries containing basic information about each directory assessment.

NextToken.description: If not null, more results are available. Pass this value for the NextToken parameter in a subsequent request to retrieve the next set of items.

AssessmentId.description: The unique identifier of the directory assessment.

DirectoryId.description: The identifier of the directory associated with this assessment.

DnsName.description: The fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of the Active Directory domain being assessed.

StartTime.description: The date and time when the assessment was initiated.

LastUpdateDateTime.description: The date and time when the assessment status was last updated.

Status.description: The current status of the assessment. Valid values include SUCCESS, FAILED, PENDING, and IN_PROGRESS.

CustomerDnsIps.description: The IP addresses of the DNS servers or domain controllers in your self-managed AD environment.

ReportType.description: The type of assessment report generated. Valid values include CUSTOMER and SYSTEM.

LogSubscriptions.description: A list of active LogSubscription objects for calling the Amazon Web Services account.

NextToken.description: The token for the next set of items to return.

DirectoryId.description: Identifier (ID) of the directory that you want to associate with the log subscription.

SubscriptionCreatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the log subscription was created.

AssessmentId.description: The unique identifier of the newly started directory assessment. Use this identifier to monitor assessment progress and retrieve results.

SharedDirectory.description: The shared directory in the directory consumer account.

OwnerAccountId.description: Identifier of the directory owner account, which contains the directory that has been shared to the consumer account.

OwnerDirectoryId.description: Identifier of the directory in the directory owner account.

ShareMethod.description: The method used when sharing a directory to determine whether the directory should be shared within your Amazon Web Services organization (ORGANIZATIONS) or with any Amazon Web Services account by sending a shared directory request (HANDSHAKE).

SharedAccountId.description: Identifier of the directory consumer account that has access to the shared directory (OwnerDirectoryId) in the directory owner account.

SharedDirectoryId.description: Identifier of the shared directory in the directory consumer account. This identifier is different for each directory owner account.

ShareStatus.description: Current directory status of the shared Managed Microsoft AD directory.

ShareNotes.description: A directory share request that is sent by the directory owner to the directory consumer. The request includes a typed message to help the directory consumer administrator determine whether to approve or reject the share invitation.

CreatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the shared directory was created.

LastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the shared directory was last updated.

DirectoryId.description: The identifier of the new directory.
The identifier of the directory.

Computer.description: A Computer object that represents the computer account.

ComputerAttributes.description: An array of Attribute objects containing the LDAP attributes that belong to the computer account.

DirectoryId.description: The identifier of the directory that was created.
The unique identifier of the newly created hybrid directory.
The identifier of the directory that was created.

SnapshotId.description: The identifier of the snapshot that was created.

TrustId.description: A unique identifier for the trust relationship that was created.

AssessmentId.description: The unique identifier of the deleted directory assessment.

DirectoryId.description: The directory identifier.

SnapshotId.description: The identifier of the directory snapshot that was deleted.

TrustId.description: The Trust ID of the trust relationship that was deleted.

Assessment.description: Detailed information about the self-managed instance settings (IDs and DNS IPs).

AssessmentReports.description: A list of assessment reports containing validation results for each domain controller and test category. Each report includes specific validation details and outcomes.

DomainControllerIp.description: The IP address of the domain controller that was tested during the assessment.

Validations.description: A list of validation results for different test categories performed against this domain controller.

DirectoryId.description: The identifier of the directory associated with this CA enrollment policy.

PcaConnectorArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon Web Services Private Certificate Authority (PCA) connector that is configured for automatic certificate enrollment in this directory.

CaEnrollmentPolicyStatus.description:
The current status of the CA enrollment policy. This indicates if automatic certificate enrollment is currently active, inactive, or in a transitional state.

Valid values:

  • IN_PROGRESS - The policy is being activated T

  • SUCCESS - The policy is active and automatic certificate enrollment is operational

  • FAILED - The policy activation or deactivation failed

  • DISABLING - The policy is being deactivated

  • DISABLED - The policy is inactive and automatic certificate enrollment is not available

  • IMPAIRED - Network connectivity is impaired.

LastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time when the CA enrollment policy was last modified or updated.

CaEnrollmentPolicyStatusReason.description: Additional information explaining the current status of the CA enrollment policy, particularly useful when the policy is in an error or transitional state.

Certificate.description: Information about the certificate, including registered date time, certificate state, the reason for the state, expiration date time, and certificate common name.

StateReason.description: Describes a state change for the certificate.

RegisteredDateTime.description: The date and time that the certificate was registered.

ExpiryDateTime.description: The date and time when the certificate will expire.

Type.description: The function that the registered certificate performs. Valid values include ClientLDAPS or ClientCertAuth. The default value is ClientLDAPS.

ClientCertAuthSettings.description: A ClientCertAuthSettings object that contains client certificate authentication settings.

OCSPUrl.description: Specifies the URL of the default OCSP server used to check for revocation status. A secondary value to any OCSP address found in the AIA extension of the user certificate.

ClientAuthenticationSettingsInfo.description: Information about the type of client authentication for the specified directory. The following information is retrieved: The date and time when the status of the client authentication type was last updated, whether the client authentication type is enabled or disabled, and the type of client authentication.

NextToken.description: The next token used to retrieve the client authentication settings if the number of setting types exceeds page limit and there is another page.

Type.description: The type of client authentication for the specified directory. If no type is specified, a list of all client authentication types that are supported for the directory is retrieved.

Status.description: Whether the client authentication type is enabled or disabled for the specified directory.

LastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time when the status of the client authentication type was last updated.

ConditionalForwarders.description: The list of conditional forwarders that have been created.

RemoteDomainName.description: The fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of the remote domains pointed to by the conditional forwarder.

DnsIpAddrs.description: The IP addresses of the remote DNS server associated with RemoteDomainName. This is the IP address of the DNS server that your conditional forwarder points to.

DnsIpv6Addrs.description: The IPv6 addresses of the remote DNS server associated with RemoteDomainName. This is the IPv6 address of the DNS server that your conditional forwarder points to.

ReplicationScope.description: The replication scope of the conditional forwarder. The only allowed value is Domain, which will replicate the conditional forwarder to all of the domain controllers for your Amazon Web Services directory.

DataAccessStatus.description: The current status of data access through the Directory Service Data API.

DomainControllers.description: List of the DomainController objects that were retrieved.

NextToken.description: If not null, more results are available. Pass this value for the NextToken parameter in a subsequent call to DescribeDomainControllers retrieve the next set of items.

DirectoryId.description: Identifier of the directory where the domain controller resides.

DomainControllerId.description: Identifies a specific domain controller in the directory.

DnsIpAddr.description: The IP address of the domain controller.

DnsIpv6Addr.description: The IPv6 address of the domain controller.

VpcId.description: The identifier of the VPC that contains the domain controller.

SubnetId.description: Identifier of the subnet in the VPC that contains the domain controller.

AvailabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone where the domain controller is located.

StatusReason.description: A description of the domain controller state.

LaunchTime.description: Specifies when the domain controller was created.

StatusLastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the status was last updated.

UpdateActivities.description: Information about update activities for the hybrid directory, organized by update type.

NextToken.description: If not null, more results are available. Pass this value for the NextToken parameter in a subsequent request to retrieve the next set of items.

SelfManagedInstances.description: A list of update activities related to the self-managed instances with SSM in the self-managed instances with SSM hybrid directory configuration.

HybridAdministratorAccount.description: A list of update activities related to hybrid directory administrator account changes.

LDAPSSettingsInfo.description: Information about LDAP security for the specified directory, including status of enablement, state last updated date time, and the reason for the state.

NextToken.description: The next token used to retrieve the LDAPS settings if the number of setting types exceeds page limit and there is another page.

LastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time when the LDAPS settings were last updated.

RegionsDescription.description: List of Region information related to the directory for each replicated Region.

NextToken.description: If not null, more results are available. Pass this value for the NextToken parameter in a subsequent call to DescribeRegions to retrieve the next set of items.

DirectoryId.description: The identifier of the directory.

RegionName.description: The name of the Region. For example, us-east-1.

RegionType.description: Specifies whether the Region is the primary Region or an additional Region.

Status.description: The status of the replication process for the specified Region.

VpcSettings.description: Contains VPC information for the CreateDirectory, CreateMicrosoftAD, or CreateHybridAD operation.

VpcId.description: The identifier of the VPC in which to create the directory.

SubnetIds.description: The identifiers of the subnets for the directory servers. The two subnets must be in different Availability Zones. Directory Service creates a directory server and a DNS server in each of these subnets.

DesiredNumberOfDomainControllers.description: The desired number of domain controllers in the specified Region for the specified directory.

StatusLastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the Region status was last updated.

LastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the Region description was last updated.

DirectoryId.description: The identifier of the directory.

SettingEntries.description:
The list of SettingEntry objects that were retrieved.

It is possible that this list contains less than the number of items specified in the Limit member of the request. This occurs if there are less than the requested number of items left to retrieve, or if the limitations of the operation have been exceeded.

NextToken.description: If not null, token that indicates that more results are available. Pass this value for the NextToken parameter in a subsequent call to DescribeSettings to retrieve the next set of items.

Type.description: The type, or category, of a directory setting. Similar settings have the same type. For example, Protocol, Cipher, or Certificate-Based Authentication.

Name.description:
The name of the directory setting. For example:

TLS_1_0

AllowedValues.description: The valid range of values for the directory setting. These values depend on the DataType of your directory.

AppliedValue.description: The value of the directory setting that is applied to the directory.

RequestedValue.description: The value that was last requested for the directory setting.

RequestStatus.description: The overall status of the request to update the directory setting request. If the directory setting is deployed in more than one region, and the request fails in any region, the overall status is Failed.

RequestDetailedStatus.description: Details about the status of the request to update the directory setting. If the directory setting is deployed in more than one region, status is returned for the request in each region where the setting is deployed.

RequestStatusMessage.description: The last status message for the directory status request.

LastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time when the directory setting was last updated.

LastRequestedDateTime.description: The date and time when the request to update a directory setting was last submitted.

DataType.description: The data type of a directory setting. This is used to define the AllowedValues of a setting. For example a data type can be Boolean, DurationInSeconds, or Enum.

SharedDirectories.description: A list of all shared directories in your account.

NextToken.description: If not null, token that indicates that more results are available. Pass this value for the NextToken parameter in a subsequent call to DescribeSharedDirectories to retrieve the next set of items.

OwnerAccountId.description: Identifier of the directory owner account, which contains the directory that has been shared to the consumer account.

OwnerDirectoryId.description: Identifier of the directory in the directory owner account.

ShareMethod.description: The method used when sharing a directory to determine whether the directory should be shared within your Amazon Web Services organization (ORGANIZATIONS) or with any Amazon Web Services account by sending a shared directory request (HANDSHAKE).

SharedAccountId.description: Identifier of the directory consumer account that has access to the shared directory (OwnerDirectoryId) in the directory owner account.

SharedDirectoryId.description: Identifier of the shared directory in the directory consumer account. This identifier is different for each directory owner account.

ShareStatus.description: Current directory status of the shared Managed Microsoft AD directory.

ShareNotes.description: A directory share request that is sent by the directory owner to the directory consumer. The request includes a typed message to help the directory consumer administrator determine whether to approve or reject the share invitation.

CreatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the shared directory was created.

LastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the shared directory was last updated.

UpdateActivities.description: The list of update activities on a directory for the requested update type.

NextToken.description: If not null, more results are available. Pass this value for the NextToken parameter.

Status.description: The status of the update performed on the directory.

StatusReason.description: The reason for the current status of the update type activity.

InitiatedBy.description: This specifies if the update was initiated by the customer or by the service team.

NewValue.description: The new value of the target setting.

OSVersion.description: OS version that the directory needs to be updated to.

PreviousValue.description: The old value of the target setting.

OSVersion.description: OS version that the directory needs to be updated to.

StartTime.description: The start time of the UpdateDirectorySetup for the particular type.

LastUpdatedDateTime.description: The last updated date and time of a particular directory setting.

SnapshotLimits.description: A SnapshotLimits object that contains the manual snapshot limits for the specified directory.

ManualSnapshotsLimit.description: The maximum number of manual snapshots allowed.

ManualSnapshotsCurrentCount.description: The current number of manual snapshots of the directory.

ManualSnapshotsLimitReached.description: Indicates if the manual snapshot limit has been reached.

NextToken.description: Indicates whether another page of certificates is available when the number of available certificates exceeds the page limit.

CertificatesInfo.description: A list of certificates with basic details including certificate ID, certificate common name, certificate state.

ExpiryDateTime.description: The date and time when the certificate will expire.

Type.description: The function that the registered certificate performs. Valid values include ClientLDAPS or ClientCertAuth. The default value is ClientLDAPS.

NextToken.description: If not null, more results are available. Pass this value for the NextToken parameter in a subsequent call to ListIpRoutes to retrieve the next set of items.

DirectoryId.description: Identifier (ID) of the directory associated with the IP addresses.

IpRouteStatusMsg.description: The status of the IP address block.

AddedDateTime.description: The date and time the address block was added to the directory.

SchemaExtensionsInfo.description: Information about the schema extensions applied to the directory.

NextToken.description: If not null, more results are available. Pass this value for the NextToken parameter in a subsequent call to ListSchemaExtensions to retrieve the next set of items.

DirectoryId.description: The identifier of the directory to which the schema extension is applied.

SchemaExtensionStatus.description: The current status of the schema extension.

StartDateTime.description: The date and time that the schema extension started being applied to the directory.

EndDateTime.description: The date and time that the schema extension was completed.

Tags.description: List of tags returned by the ListTagsForResource operation.

Key.description: Required name of the tag. The string value can be Unicode characters and cannot be prefixed with "aws:". The string can contain only the set of Unicode letters, digits, white-space, '_', '.', '/', '=', '+', '-', ':', '@'(Java regex: "^([\\p{L}\\p{Z}\\p{N}_.:/=+\\-]*)$").

Value.description: The optional value of the tag. The string value can be Unicode characters. The string can contain only the set of Unicode letters, digits, white-space, '_', '.', '/', '=', '+', '-', ':', '@' (Java regex: "^([\\p{L}\\p{Z}\\p{N}_.:/=+\\-]*)$").

SharedDirectoryId.description: Identifier of the shared directory in the directory consumer account.
Identifier of the directory that is stored in the directory consumer account that is shared from the specified directory (DirectoryId).

SchemaExtensionId.description: The identifier of the schema extension that will be applied.

SharedDirectoryId.description: Identifier of the directory stored in the directory consumer account that is to be unshared from the specified directory (DirectoryId).

DirectoryId.description: The identifier of the updated hybrid directory.

AssessmentId.description: The identifier of the assessment performed to validate the update configuration. This assessment ensures the updated settings are compatible with your environment.

DirectoryId.description: The identifier of the directory.

TrustId.description: The unique Trust ID of the trust relationship that was verified.
